parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ code: $json.code, purchaser_name: $json.purchaser_name, purchaser_email: $json.purchaser_email, recipient_name: $json.recipient_name, recipient_email: $json.recipient_email, amount: $json.amount, message: $json.message, status: 'active', expires_at: $json.expires_at, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { name: 'TotalGuard Yard Care', email: 'workelyhelp@gmail.com' }, to: [{ email: $json.recipient_email, name: $json.recipient_name }], subject: `You received a $${$json.amount} TotalGuard Yard Care Gift Certificate!`, htmlContent: `

🎁 Gift Certificate — $${$json.amount}

Hi ${$json.recipient_name},

${$json.purchaser_name} has sent you a TotalGuard Yard Care gift certificate!

Your Code: ${$json.code}

Message: ${$json.message}

Redeem at: ${$vars.TG_SITE_URL}/get-quote

Expires: ${new Date($json.expires_at).toLocaleDateString()}

` }) }}
